visual_description: The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful electronic drone that immediately establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere. The video opens on a very dark, close-up shot of a person's silhouette in what appears to be a confined space, possibly a vehicle. The figure is mostly obscured by shadow, with only faint outlines visible. In the upper left corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera is shaky, suggesting a handheld perspective, and the low lighting creates a sense of secrecy and urgency. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a person's hand gripping a gear shift lever inside a car. The shot is tight, focusing on the hand and the mechanism. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner. The lighting is dim, highlighting the texture of the hand and the metallic parts of the gear shift. The camera pans up to a close-up of a man's face, partially illuminated. He has a serious and focused expression, looking down and to his right. The background is dark and out of focus.
